audit_items.proof_trace: malloc() return values at lines 289-290 are dereferenced by memset() at lines 291-292 and by array access at lines 296, 300-301 without NULL checks. Memory allocation can fail causing immediate segfault.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker triggers depth mode initialization when system memory is low, causing malloc to fail and segfault the application when memset or array access occurs.
